hero.badge: Part-Time Survey and Data Insights Analyst - … · Contract
hero.description: Analytics contractor with an MS in Economics and fifteen years of experience delivering survey programs, reporting dashboards, and multi-source insights on a project basis. I have used Qualtrics to build surveys for economic research during my graduate program, as well as in subsequent client assignments. Most of my work has been short-term or part-time contract assignments across financial services, public sector, manufacturing, and reinsurance. I focus on what Human Resources and Learning and Development teams need most: sound survey design, validated data, and reporting that holds up in a leadership review. My most recent contract ended in March 2026. I am available for part-time contract work with defined scope, regular progress updates, and clear documentation at handoff.

highlights.label: Survey design, administration, and analysis (Qualtrics, Microsoft Forms)
Multi-source reporting from learning management system exports, assessments, surveys, and employee records
Dashboard and KPI development (Power BI, Tableau, SSRS, advanced Excel)

items.title: Executive KPI Dashboard Refresh
bullets: Maintained Power BI and Tableau dashboards on a weekly cadence for executive stakeholders (KPIs, variances, and program trends), replacing manual Excel reconciliation cycles.

Combined actuarial, finance, valuation, and operational data into a single reporting view with brief narrative notes; delivered SSRS and advanced Excel reports for ad hoc requests between release cycles.

items.title: Qualtrics & Survey Reporting Build
bullets: Designed Qualtrics and Microsoft Forms collection flows with branching logic, dynamic paths, and dashboard views aligned to downstream reporting requirements.
Established consistent KPI definitions and period-over-period reporting, the same rigor required for pulse surveys and quarterly skills assessments.

items.title: Multi-Source Insights & Validation
bullets: Validated and reconciled structured response and operational datasets before results were shared with leadership.
Documented outliers and material trend changes in concise summaries managers could review without additional explanation.

items.title: Tax Administration Reporting & Audit
items.organization: Mecklenburg County Office of the Tax Collector
bullets: Supported tax administration with auditing, automation, and reporting, validating transactional data, building repeatable pipelines, and producing dashboard KPIs for management review.
Automated manual Excel and SQL-backed reporting steps and provided documentation county staff could use after the contract ended.

items.title: Banking Dashboard & Reconciliation
bullets: Built SQL-based reporting dashboards for business stakeholders in a regulated environment and confirmed metric accuracy before internal use.
Automated recurring validation and reporting tasks; coordinated scope with internal teams and delivered documented reporting assets at agreed milestones.

items.title: Qualtrics Surveys for Economic Research
items.context: Academic research · During MS in Economics
bullets: Built Qualtrics surveys to support economic research projects, including instrument design, branching logic, and response collection aligned to study requirements.
Analyzed survey response data using applied econometrics methods for research deliverables and faculty review.

items.title: Human Resources KPI Reporting
bullets: Completed reporting projects for Human Resources, Finance, Sales, Marketing, and executive leadership, including workforce planning views, leadership review packs, and automated KPI templates.
Followed a consistent project rhythm: requirements discussion, scoped deliverable, review, and handoff, often while supporting parallel requests from other functions.

items.title: Executive Review Pack Automation
bullets: Automated recurring operational dashboards to shorten month-end reporting cycles and provide a consistent cross-functional view for leadership.
Converted broad business questions into defined reporting requirements and returned charts with supporting commentary for staff meetings.

groups.title: Survey & Insights
items: Qualtrics (including surveys for economic research), Microsoft Forms, survey instrument design, response-data analysis, multi-source interpretation (surveys, assessments, learning management system exports, employee records)

groups.title: Reporting & Visualization
items: Power BI, Tableau, SSRS, advanced Excel (Power Query, pivot models, VBA), KPI and trend dashboards, executive summaries

groups.title: Analytics
items: SQL, R, Python, applied econometrics, auditing, data validation and reconciliation, reporting automation (Excel, VBA, SQL)

groups.title: Contract Delivery
items: Short-term and rolling assignments, part-time engagement, milestone-based delivery, documentation at handoff, cross-functional partnership with Human Resources, Learning and Development, finance, and business stakeholders

contact.label: 06 / Hire
contact.title: Available for Contract Engagements
contact.intro: Open to contract roles through agencies and direct clients. Based in Illinois; available for remote and hybrid engagements.

valueItems.label: Fast ramp
valueItems.body: Deep domain experience in regulated financial services

valueItems.label: Independent execution
valueItems.body: Self-directed within matrix teams across finance, IT, and compliance
